About Me

I am a Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in Python automation tool development, Automotive ADAS systems, Static Code Analysis, and CAN signal tracing. I have hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, VMware Data Centre Virtualisation, and currently expanding my expertise in Ansible & Docker.

Technical Skills

Python Development

Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Tkinter, OpenPyXL, Automation Tools

Automotive & ADAS

CANalyzer, CANoe, Signal Tracing, Static Code Analysis

Cloud & Virtualization

AWS, Azure, VMware Aria Automation, Infrastructure Automation

DevOps & Automation

Ansible, Docker, CI/CD Concepts, Linux, Networking

Experience Highlights

Python Automation Engineer

Developed internal automation tools using Python & Excel VBA for data processing and reporting.

ADAS Software Engineer

Worked on CAN Ethernet signal tracing, static code validation, and system reliability enhancement.

Cloud & Virtualization Projects

Experience in instance creation, cluster mapping, network configuration, resource lock handling.
